BlbInquiry.blbType: blb type. Defaults to normal type if not specified. Valid values: "normal" (standard), "application" (application), "ipv6" (standard IPv6), "ipv6Application" (application IPv6)
BlbInquiry.performanceLevel: Performance specification. Defaults to shared type if not specified. Valid values: "small1" (Standard 1), "small2" (Standard 2), "medium1" (Enhanced 1), "medium2" (Enhanced 2), "large1" (Ultra-large 1), "large2" (Ultra-large 2), "large3" (Ultra-large 3)
BlbInquiry.count: Purchase quantity. Defaults to 1 if not specified
BlbInquiry.billing.billingMethod: Billing method. Not required for prepaid; required for postpaid. By fixed specification (BySpec) or by usage (ByCapacityUnit)
BlbInquiry.billing.reservation: Reservation info. Not required for postpaid; required for prepaid
